expectations.text: The decision marks the skill as applicable.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "applicable": true,
  "agent_type": "code-review",
  "model_tier": "standard",
  "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
  "justification": "Large code reviews heavily optimize for input costs. With gpt-5.4 unavailable, we fallback to gpt-5.3-codex as the cheapest suitable standard tier alternative.",
  "fallback_strategy": "use next cheapest standard tier model"
}
